prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document provides guidance for charity trustees in England, outlining their legal duties and decision-making principles regarding the acceptance, refusal, or return of donations. It specifically references laws and regulations applicable in England, indicating that it is intended for use in that nation.
